---
title: "Amanda Loehrke"
description: "Ph.D. Candidate in Political Science, University of California, Davis"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap">
  <div class="site-sidebar">
    <div class="site-photo"></div>
    <div class="site-heading">
      <h1>Amanda Loehrke</h1>
      <svg class="site-underline" viewBox="0 0 260 10" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M2 6 C 40 2, 70 9, 110 5 S 180 1, 258 6" fill="none" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
      <p class="site-sub">Ph.D. Candidate</p>
      <p class="site-kicker">Political Science, UC Davis</p>
      <div class="site-contact">
        <a href="mailto:aloehrke@ucdavis.edu" aria-label="Email" title="aloehrke@ucdavis.edu">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
            <rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"></rect>
            <path d="M3 7l9 6 9-6"></path>
          </svg>
        </a>
        <a href="AL-CV-2026.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Curriculum Vitae" title="Download CV">CV</a>
      </div>

      <nav class="site-nav">
        <a href="index.html" class="is-active">Home</a>
        <a href="research.html">Research</a>
        <a href="teaching.html">Teaching</a>
        <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="site-main">
    <div class="site-section">
      <h2>Biography</h2>
      <p>I am a Ph.D. Candidate in the Department of Political Science at the University of California, Davis. My research focuses on American politics and methodology, with particular interests in gender politics, race &amp; ethnic politics, and media communication. I am interested in how people&rsquo;s identities influence how they interact in politics from the voter and candidate perspectives. Methodologically, I use computational social science, natural language processing, text as data, and machine learning.</p>
      <p>Additionally, I have extensive teaching experience, having served as a teaching assistant for graduate and undergraduate courses in quantitative methods and American politics, and for the ICPSR Summer Program in Quantitative Methods.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="site-section">
      <h2>Education</h2>
      <div class="site-edu">
        <div class="site-edu-item"><span class="site-degree">Ph.D., Political Science</span><span class="site-where">2022&ndash;2027 (in progress), University of California, Davis</span></div>
        <div class="site-edu-item"><span class="site-degree">B.A., Political Science</span><span class="site-where">2021, University of Wisconsin&ndash;Green Bay</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="site-section">
      <h2>Research interests</h2>
      <div class="site-pill-group">
        <h3>Substantive</h3>
        <div class="site-pills">
          <span>American Political Behavior</span>
          <span>Gender Politics</span>
          <span>Race &amp; Ethnic Politics</span>
          <span>Identity &amp; Representation</span>
          <span>Media &amp; Political Communication</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="site-pill-group">
        <h3>Methodological</h3>
        <div class="site-pills">
          <span>Computational Social Science</span>
          <span>Natural Language Processing</span>
          <span>Machine Learning</span>
          <span>Text Analysis &amp; Classification</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="site-end-divider"></div>
    <svg class="site-end-mark" viewBox="0 0 100 10" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M2 6 C 14 2, 22 9, 34 5 S 54 1, 66 6 S 86 9, 98 5" fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
```
